partsUsed: Leaves, seeds (related P. ovata is ispaghula)
habitat: Cosmopolitan temperate weed of paths and lawns.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional leaf poultice for insect bites and minor wounds; demulcent leaf tea.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditioneller Blattumschlag bei Insektenstichen und kleinen Wunden; reizmildernder Tee.
preparation: Crushed fresh leaf poultice; dried leaf tea.
cautions: Generally safe topically and as mild tea. Wound infection needs medical care.
historicalNotes: Called white man’s footprint where it spread with European paths.
partsUsedDe: Leaves, Samen (related P. ovata is ispaghula)
habitatDe: Cosmopolitan gemäßigt weed von paths und lawns.
preparationDe: Crushed frisch Blatt Umschlag; getrocknet Blatt Tee.
cautionsDe: Im Allgemeinen unbedenklich topically und as mild Tee. Wound infection needs medizinische Versorgung.
historicalNotesDe: Called white man’s footprint where it spread mit Europaan paths.
